title: Create Mask for Axonal Quantification Analysis with FIJI
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6ucrv","text":"This is a protocol describing how to create a quantified mask from an image of fluorescence-tagged axonal projections using FIJI/ImageJ software.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Upload TIFF image of single-channel fluorescent axons to Fiji
Adjust brightness/contrast (keyboard shortcut: ctrl + shift + C)
Synchronize windows: select Analyze -> Tools -> Synchronize windows
Adjust the thresholding value to your needs
Save created mask as tiff file.
creator: Elizabeth Phelan
